layers.title: New sampling data structures
layers.summary: Introduces `SampleRate` (ppm + precomputed uint64 threshold), `LogSampleConfig` (enabled flag + three rates), `LogSamplerSnapshot` (immutable config published via atomic pointer), `LogSampleUserConfig` (user-facing doubles with explicit bits), and `LogSamplerPersistentExplicitState` (sticky explicit tracking). `LogSampleConfigPb` proto message is declared in `log_sampler.h` as a forward declaration and fully defined by `log_sampler_proto.cpp` against `share_memory.pb.h`. Thresholds are converted at config-write time only — the hot path never does floating-point or division.

layers.title: LogSampler singleton and hot-path logic
layers.summary: Implements the `LogSampler` singleton with atomic raw-pointer snapshot publish, `IsSamplerEnabledFast()` relaxed-load gate, `ShouldCreateRuntimeLog()` classification-first decision tree (FATAL bypass → REQUEST → DIAGNOSTIC → ACCESS), `IsCurrentRequestSampledIn()` get-or-create trace decision, `ShouldSampleEvent()` with `thread_local` sequence decorrelation, and `ShouldRecordAccess()` early guard. The old `LogRateLimiter` (first-N CAS-based window counter) is deleted entirely. `log.h` macros now call `ShouldCreateLogMessage()` and a new `ShouldCreatePlogMessage()` before stream payload evaluation. `LogMessageImpl::Init()` gains a defensive backstop via a new `samplerChecked` parameter. `trace.cpp` removes `EnsureRequestSampleDecision` calls since the sampler now owns lazy GetOrCreate. `zmq_common.h` `GetOrCreateLogSampleState()` and `ApplyLogSampleState()` are updated to route through `LogSampler::IsCurrentRequestSampledIn()` instead of `LogRateLimiter`.
layers.diagram:
flowchart TD
  LOG["LOG(INFO)/PLOG macro"] --> SEV{severity enabled?}
  SEV -->|no| DROP0[drop]
  SEV -->|yes| FATAL{FATAL?}
  FATAL -->|yes| EMIT[emit]
  FATAL -->|no| EN{sampler enabled?}
  EN -->|no| EMIT
  EN -->|yes| CLS[ClassifyRuntime]
  CLS -->|BYPASS| EMIT
  CLS -->|REQUEST| REQRATE{requestRate}
  REQRATE -->|0| SETREJECT["set reject, drop"]
  REQRATE -->|1M| EMIT
  REQRATE -->|mid| GETORC[GetOrCreate trace decision]
  GETORC -->|admitted| EMIT
  GETORC -->|rejected| DROP0
  CLS -->|DIAGNOSTIC| SAMPLEDIN{request sampled-in?}
  SAMPLEDIN -->|yes| EMIT
  SAMPLEDIN -->|no| DIAGRATE{diagRate.ppm}
  DIAGRATE -->|0| DROP0
  DIAGRATE -->|>0| EVENT[ShouldSampleEvent]
  EVENT -->|pass| EMIT
  EVENT -->|fail| DROP0

bcFindings.evidence: src/datasystem/common/log/spdlog/log_rate_limiter.h and log_rate_limiter.cpp deleted in full; callers in log.h, trace.cpp, zmq_common.h, flags.cpp, client_worker_common_api.cpp were all updated to use LogSampler.

layers.title: Typed fluent facade for AccessRecorder
layers.summary: The `AccessRecorder` class is refactored: old imperative `Record(StatusCode, string, RequestParam, ...)` overloads are replaced with three typed builder classes returned by static factories: `AccessRecorder::Object(key)` → `ObjectAccessRecorder`, `AccessRecorder::Stream(key)` → `StreamAccessRecorder`, `AccessRecorder::RequestOut(key)` → `RequestOutRecorder`. Each facade accumulates field state (object keys via VIEW/OWNED/VECTOR_REF/C_ARRAY_REF/PROVIDER kinds, data sizes with lazy provider support) and flushes to `AccessRecorder::WriteObject()`/`WriteStream()` only at `Record()` call time. The `AccessRecorder` constructor now calls `LogSampler::Instance().ShouldRecordAccess(key)` early; if sampled-out, all subsequent field-setter calls are no-ops and `Record()` returns immediately, skipping `clock::now()`, key formatting, `RequestParam::ToString()`, and exporter writes. `AccessRecorderStreamWrap` is deleted. `GetAccessKeyType()`, `FormatAccessReqMsg()`, and additional `objectKeysToString()` overloads (proto repeated field, C-array with lengths) are added.

layers.title: Callsite migration across all client and worker paths
layers.summary: Every callsite that previously constructed an `AccessRecorder` and called `Record(...)` is rewritten to use the new fluent facade. The pattern `AccessRecorder accessPoint(key); ...; RequestParam req; req.objectKey=...; accessPoint.Record(code, size, req, msg)` becomes `auto access = AccessRecorder::Object(key); access.ObjectKeyRef(key).Result(rc).DataSize(n).Record()`. For asynchronous paths (async MGetH2D, async MSetD2H), `std::shared_ptr<AccessRecorder>` is replaced by `std::shared_ptr<ObjectAccessRecorder>`. Stream service impls replace `AccessRecorderStreamWrap` with `shared_ptr<StreamAccessRecorder>` and explicit `Result()` + `Record()` calls. `UnaryRequest` in request_table.h changes from holding `shared_ptr<AccessRecorder>` to `shared_ptr<ObjectAccessRecorder>`.

bcFindings.symbol: AccessRecorder::Record(StatusCode, const std::string&, const RequestParam&, const std::string&, uint64_t)
bcFindings.evidence: access_recorder.h: all three Record() overloads (StatusCode+dataSize+RequestParam, int+dataSize+RequestParam, StatusCode+StreamRequestParam+StreamResponseParam) are removed from the class definition and access_recorder.cpp.
access_recorder.h: explicit constructor taking std::string handleName is removed; only the AccessRecorderKey overload remains.

access_recorder.h: struct AccessRecorderStreamWrap { AccessRecorder recorder; StreamRequestParam reqParam; StreamResponseParam rspParam; ... } is fully removed; all stream-service callsites replaced with shared_ptr<StreamAccessRecorder>.
request_table.h: accessRecorderPoint parameter type changes from std::shared_ptr<AccessRecorder> to std::shared_ptr<ObjectAccessRecorder> across all UnaryRequest constructor overloads.

layers.title: New LogSampleConfigPb proto + field 24 reuse
layers.summary: Adds `LogSampleConfigPb { bool enabled; uint32 access_sample_ppm; uint32 request_sample_ppm; uint32 diagnostic_sample_ppm }` to `share_memory.proto`. The existing field 24 in `RegisterClientRspPb` is changed from `int32 log_rate_limit` to `LogSampleConfigPb log_sample_config` — a wire-incompatible reuse of the same field number with a different wire type (varint → length-delimited). `HeartbeatRspPb` gains `LogSampleConfigPb log_sample_config = 8` (new field). `meta_zmq.proto` comment updates reflect the change from `log_rate_limit`-based state to `request_sample_rate`-based state.

layers.title: Three-rate gflags, EmbeddedConfig API, flags derivation, worker push, client apply
layers.summary: Replaces `DS_DEFINE_int32(log_rate_limit, 0, ...)` with three double-precision gflags (`request_sample_rate`, `access_sample_rate`, `diagnostic_sample_rate`), each with range validators and trust-list entries. `EmbeddedConfig::LogRateLimit(int)` is removed; three typed setters `RequestSampleRate(double)`, `AccessSampleRate(double)`, `DiagnosticSampleRate(double)` are added. `flags.cpp::UpdateFlagParameter()` is refactored into `UpdateSingleFlag()` + `ValidateAndCommitSamplerFlags()` + `CommitSamplerFlagsTransaction()` to handle atomic two-phase commit of the three sampler flags with revert on failure. `logging.cpp::InitLogSampler()` reads the three flags at startup (checking `wasSpecified` for explicit-state tracking) and fails-fast on invalid values. `worker_service_impl.cpp` calls `LogSampler::Instance().PopulateConfigProto()` in `RegisterClient` and `Heartbeat` responses. `client_worker_common_api.cpp` adds `MaybeApplyLogSampleConfig()` called on `has_log_sample_config()` in both register and heartbeat handlers for local and remote workers.

bcFindings.evidence: include/datasystem/utils/embedded_config.h: EmbeddedConfig &LogRateLimit(int limit) declaration removed; embedded_config.cpp implementation replaced with three new setters RequestSampleRate/AccessSampleRate/DiagnosticSampleRate.

share_memory.proto field 24 changes from 'int32 log_rate_limit' (wire type 0 varint) to 'LogSampleConfigPb log_sample_config' (wire type 2 length-delimited) — same field number, incompatible wire types; old clients reading field 24 as int32 receive malformed data from new servers.

layers.title: Bazel targets, CMake, Helm, deployment JSON
layers.summary: Adds new Bazel targets to break circular dependencies: `log_sampler_header` (hdrs-only, no circular deps), `log_sampler` (srcs + proto dep), `access_recorder_header` (hdrs-only for log_sampler dep), and `ds_flags_header` (hdrs-only for log_sampler_header dep). CMakeLists in `common/log` adds `log_sampler.cpp` to sources and a new `common_log_proto` static library for `log_sampler_proto.cpp`. K8s Helm `values.yaml` replaces `logRateLimit: 0` with three nullable fields `requestSampleRate`, `accessSampleRate`, `diagnosticSampleRate`; configmap and daemonset templates use `kindIs "invalid"` guards to emit only explicitly-set flags (critical for request-only derivation semantics). `worker.config` JSON replaces `log_rate_limit` entry with three empty-string rate entries.

layers.title: New LogSampler unit, integration, performance, and ST tests
layers.summary: Adds five new UT files: `log_sampler_test.cpp` (core: derivation, normalization, hash-threshold, random ratio at 0.1/0.5/0.9, 20-bucket distribution, same-trace sequential decorrelation, concurrent config+hotpath safety), `log_sampler_integration_test.cpp` (LOG/PLOG macro: FATAL bypass, request sampled-in forcing diagnostics, diagnostic supplement sampling, background bypass, PLOG-as-DIAGNOSTIC, forceLog semantics), `log_sampler_access_test.cpp`, `log_sampler_config_test.cpp` (derivation rules, sticky explicit, proto config, previous-good retention), and `log_access_facade_test.cpp` (ObjectAccessRecorder/StreamAccessRecorder/RequestOutRecorder facets). Deletes `log_rate_limiter_test.cpp` (459 lines). Updates `log_message_test.cpp` and `logging_test.cpp` to use `LogSampler` instead of `LogRateLimiter`. Adds ST test `log_sampler_st_test.cpp` covering cross-process sampling consistency (LS-002b, LS-012) and worker config delivery (LS-013). `zmq_trace_sampling_meta_test.cpp` is updated to exercise `LogSampler`-based metadata state.

layers.title: Design docs, user guide, repo-context index updates
layers.summary: Adds three new `.repo_context` files: `log-sampler-design.md` (835 lines: full accepted design with terminology, architecture, hot-path constraints, configuration model, derivation rules, RPC consistency, observability, and LS-0xx verification scenarios), `specs/log-sampler-spec.md` (93 lines: R1–R18 requirements), `plans/log-sampler-plan.md` (98 lines: phased implementation plan). Updates `README.md` to describe `LogSampler` alongside existing components and adds routing entries. `index.md` adds two routing rows for log-sampler design. User docs (`log_guide.md`, `dscli.md`) replace `log_rate_limit` table entries with three new sampling-rate parameter rows including derivation-rule annotations; `client_env_guide.md` removes the `DATASYSTEM_LOG_RATE_LIMIT` environment variable entry.
layers.diff:
+| request_sample_rate | double | 1.0 | 请求日志采样率（0.0–1.0）。1.0=全量保留；0.0=丢弃请求级 INFO/VLOG |
+| access_sample_rate  | double | 1.0 (派生) | 接口日志采样率 |
+| diagnostic_sample_rate | double | 1.0 (派生) | 诊断日志采样率，控制 ERROR/WARNING/PLOG 补充采样 |
-| log_rate_limit | int | 0 | 每秒采样请求数上限 |

summary: Replaces the first-N `LogRateLimiter` with a unified random `LogSampler` (three independent hash-threshold sampling dimensions: request/access/diagnostic), adds typed fluent `AccessRecorder` facades with lazy field materialization and early sampler guard, propagates `LogSampleConfigPb` from worker to clients via register/heartbeat, and migrates all callsites and tests across the entire codebase.
